reference_oracles.role: permissive accuracy-first in-process/out-of-tree reference capture runner
reference_oracles.license_policy: ISC/permissive core; keep notices reviewed before bundling
reference_oracles.integration_policy: preferred first implementation target because the project already has local ares harnesses

reference_oracles.license_policy: GPL or mixed policies; optional out-of-process validation only
reference_oracles.integration_policy: use to corroborate ares/libgme output, not as a required app dependency

comparison_policy.spc_exactness: compare signatures, header registers, selected APU RAM region hashes, and DSP register snapshots where the reference exposes them
comparison_policy.pcm_exactness: do not require byte-perfect PCM across independent renderers before alignment/timing has been characterized
comparison_policy.minimum_first_gate: all representative jobs produce reference captures and classify as pass, audio_equivalent_state_delta, explained_timing_offset, or investigated_mismatch
comparison_policy.promotion_gate: expand the same comparison contract from representative_tracks to all_tracks after the runner is stable

release_gates: Reference captures must be generated locally from a user-provided ROM.
Reference SPC/WAV/PCM outputs must stay under ignored build/audio paths.
Each mismatch must be classified as timing offset, renderer difference, snapshot-state difference, or unknown.
Representative-track oracle comparison must pass before claiming release-quality audio playback/export.
All-track oracle comparison should pass before claiming fully validated audio reconstruction.
